impact: This prevents the supervisor from repeatedly selecting the same broad source-freshness tasks that failed with Python SyntaxError, while preserving completed work and giving the daemon a deterministic next path: finish active missing-information validation, then recover source freshness through import test, minimal fixture, small classifier, and renderer.
summary: Repair the PP&D daemon task board so blocked source-freshness work is parked behind syntax-first recovery tasks and the active independent validation task remains selectable.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 2 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-54: Add a source freshness fixture that classifies stale PP&D guidance, changed content hashes, removed pages, and recrawl priority without performing a live recrawl.; Task checkbox-55: Add a fixture-only change report renderer for public PP&D source freshness results that summarizes changed requirements, new or removed links, and affected permit-process fixtures with citation references.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
